Video.summary: Mark is hired to restore the body, paint, and suspension of a '70 AAR Cuda 340 Six Barrel car. The shop gets some needed upgrades and the '71 Charger 440 Six Pack Triple Green car is completed to OEM Specifications.
Video.title: Hey, Charger!

Video.summary: The '70 Sunroof Challenger is painted and ready for final assembly. The '69 Daytona Charger is disassembled and readied to be shipped to the media blasters. Mark and the Ghoulz head out to the junkyard to blow off some steam playing paintball.
Video.title: Wet Paint

Video.summary: Mark and the Ghoulz use their brand new Shop Crane to lower the body of the '71 Cuda 340 Triple Black 'Phantasm' Tribute car onto its restored suspension and its drive-train is assembled and installed.
Video.title: Factory Correct

Video.summary: The '69 Daytona Charger returns from the media blaster and Mark gives Josh a history lesson on the '70 AAR Cuda 340 Six Barrel Car before removing it's drive-train and suspension.
Video.title: Holley Equipped

Video.summary: The ghouls get the '70 AAR Cuda 340 Six Barrel car completely disassembled and off to the media blaster. Mark disassembles and restores the right-hand door to the 71' 440 Phantom Cuda. In addition, the headliner and vinyl top is installed in the 71 'Phantasm' Tribute car.
Video.title: Every Rose Has Its Thorn

Video.summary: The ghouls get the '70 AAR Cuda 340 Six Barrel car completely disassembled and off to the media blaster. Mark disassembles and restores the right-hand door to the 71' 440 Phantom Cuda. In addition, the headliner and vinyl top is installed in the 71 'Phantasm' Tribute car.
Video.title: Every Rose Has Its Thorn

Video.summary: The owner of the '70 AAR Cuda 340 Six Barrel car visits the shop and learns about assembly-line markings. Mark checks the paint on the body of the '70 Cuda 383 Automatic FE5 Rallye Red Car and discovers a major problem.
Video.title: You Win Some …

Video.summary: The ghouls receives a '70 Barracuda Convertible to get a full restoration. Despite improbability, Mark straightens the fender for the '71 440 Phantom Cuda and the crew continues the restoration of the '71 'Phantasm' Tribute car.
Video.title: Cuda Madness

Video.summary: The ghouls receives a '70 Barracuda Convertible to get a full restoration. Despite improbability, Mark straightens the fender for the '71 440 Phantom Cuda and the crew continues the restoration of the '71 'Phantasm' Tribute car.
Video.title: Cuda Madness

Video.summary: The ghouls detail and assemble the suspension of the '70 AAR Cuda 340 Six Barrel car. The owners of the '70 Plymouth Superbird, in the queue for resurrection, visit the shop and Daren convinces the crew to throw a birthday party for Mark.
Video.title: Flippin' the Bird

Video.summary: Mark takes some time for himself and leaves Daren in charge of the shop. The crew gets the newly painted panels installed on the '70 Cuda 383 Automatic FE5 Rallye Red Car. And Mark discovers a chip on the '71 'Phantasm' Tribute car and no one will own up to it.
Video.title: Fish n' Chips

Video.summary: Nick Rutter shows you the most helpful and handy car care accessories
Video.title: Car Care Accessories

Video.summary: Nick Rutter shows you the how to clean and coat your matte finish
Video.title: Matte Finishes

Video.summary: The guys tackle an issue with runout on a good set of rotors with the use of an on-car lathe.
Video.title: Rotor Runout

Video.summary: The guys do a complete deconstruction of the new Scorpion diesel engine, showing how the new technology and block design completely revolutionized the 6.7L engine.
Video.title: Diesel Engine Tech

Video.summary: Kevin and Willie take the engine out of a C5 Corvette, tear it down, and get it ready for a performance rebuild.
Video.title: Project C5: Part 1

Video.summary: The guys swap out a damaged clutch on a 2012 Mustang and go for performance with a lightweight twin plate clutch.
Video.title: Mustang Clutch

Video.summary: Our C5 project continues with a build up of the lower end of the LS1 engine.
Video.title: LS1 Engine Build

Video.summary: The suspension gets completely reworked on the C5 Corvette. Then the guys finish up the engine, getting it ready for re-install.
Video.title: Project C5: Part 3

Video.summary: Jeeps are notoriously underpowered, but it’s nothing a supercharger can’t fix.
Video.title: Supercharged Jeep

Video.summary: The guys do their best to help a friend out with some body damage on a 1950 5-window pickup truck. Will it become too much to handle?
Video.title: Body Panel Replacement

Video.summary: On this edition of Caffeine & Octane, we’ll go inside the head of Master Builder Bryan Fuller at the SEMA car show, the largest annual trade show in the country; SEMA always brings out the best in the automotive industry. From a jaw dropping Javelin to a multimillion-dollar Pagani, Brian will prove to you, what happens in Vegas, doesn’t always stay in Vegas! Ryan Hardwick guest hosts and ventures deep into the C&O lots to find his favorite ride of the day.
Video.title: SEMA: Inside Fuller's Head

Video.summary: Take apart and assemble a motor in less than 30 minutes? Sure, NASCAR pit crews can make the claim, but can a rag tag group of kids with names like Jelly Donut, Butter Bean, and Wonder Woman claim the pit fame? Host Rickey Gadson heads to the Sims Academy to settle a bet. This ultra fast half-hour edition of Caffeine & Octane also includes a builder’s take on an Ultra Four Unlimited Off-Road Racer; Ryan Hardwick joins the gang at Caffeine and Octane.
Video.title: Motor Masters

Video.summary: Demetrio Montalvo likes American music, American food, and especially American cars. Only one problem - Demetrio lives in Cuba. A Visa, bestowed to him from some American friends in high places, lets him travel to the States to search for tough to find automotive parts and attend his favorite car show. Showing up to Caffeine & Octane in a cool caddy is the easy part. Picking parts to take back home presents a unique set of challenges for the Cuban car builder; Formula Drift racer Federico Sceriffo brings the first ever Formula Drift Ferrari to C&O.
Video.title: Viva Cuba!

Video.summary: Porsche collector, customizer, and Urban Outlaw, Magnus Walker is a world-wide rock star to fans of the German car company. So, when Caffeine & Octane producers invited him to travel cross country to tell the story of a hidden Porsche collection tangled in a North Georgia Vineyard, they were surprised when he signed on. No sour grapes here, what Walker found at the Wolf Mountain Winery will impress even those with the most refined palette for Porsches.
Video.title: Magnus Walker's Secret Porsche Collection

Video.summary: A Hall of Famer?s search for an Exotic Car that fits; a blind man?s ?touchy feely? approach to seeing great cars.
Video.title: Chipper Jones' International Car Show

Video.summary: Back to the future with a Majestic build from Fuller Moto that showcases 3-D printed parts, an electric motor, and hub-centric steering.
Video.title: Fuller's "2029" Majestic Build

Video.summary: Horsepower and million-dollar sticker shock, from two and four wheels, dominate this edition of C & O.
Video.title: The Fastest Man on Two Wheels

Image.alt: The Fastest Man on Two Wheels
The Fastest Man on Two Wheels
The Fastest Man on Two Wheels

Video.summary: A need for speed in a Sleepy Georgia town has engineers pushing the boundaries to exceed 3000 horsepower.
Video.title: Power Play: Proline's Search for 3000+ HP

Image.alt: Power Play: Proline's Search for 3000+ HP
Power Play: Proline's Search for 3000+ HP
Power Play: Proline's Search for 3000+ HP

Video.summary: Turn of the century cars?with wooden wheels?at 85mph?oh my!
Video.title: Turn of the Century Cars

Video.summary: Urban Outlaw and designer Magnus Walker weighs in on his beloved Porsche and the legend of Hot Wheels.
Video.title: Hot Wheel's & an Urban Outlaw

Video.summary: Tracing the origins and solving the mystery of a controversial all-aluminum bodied 512 BBI Boxer Ferrari.
Video.title: Proving Provenance on a One-Off Ferrari

Image.alt: Proving Provenance on a One-Off Ferrari
Proving Provenance on a One-Off Ferrari
Proving Provenance on a One-Off Ferrari

Video.summary: Caffeine & Octane goes Turbo in the Twin Cities; Ferrari Drifter Federico Sceriffo finds a home in Atlanta.
Video.title: Twin City Turbos

Video.summary: Jaguar F-Type Project 7 crosses the Pond.
Video.title: 470MPH with Custom King George Poteet

Video.summary: Mustang Mayhem at the big show.
Video.title: Art & Oddities at Old Car City, USA

Image.alt: Art & Oddities at Old Car City, USA
Art & Oddities at Old Car City, USA
Art & Oddities at Old Car City, USA

Video.summary: Red carpet receptions for a Koenigsegg Regera.
Video.title: The Unsung Hero in the Movie Ford v. Ferrari

Image.alt: The Unsung Hero in the Movie Ford v. Ferrari
The Unsung Hero in the Movie Ford v. Ferrari
The Unsung Hero in the Movie Ford v. Ferrari

Video.summary: Covert cars that slipped into the U.S.
Video.title: Hollywood's Cars Come to Life at Picture Car Productions

Image.alt: Hollywood's Cars Come to Life at Picture Car Productions
Hollywood's Cars Come to Life at Picture Car Productions
Hollywood's Cars Come to Life at Picture Car Productions
